title: Havens Cobblemon
description: This is a modpack that adds a extra mods to a cobblemon modpack making it feel more like an adventure, mostly designed for Havens gaming cobblemon server
body:
This modpack is tailor-made for the Haven's Gaming community. It's packed with everything you need to enjoy a smooth, immersive, and personalized experience on our server. Just load it up, and you're ready to start your Cobblemon adventure!

**Optimized Performance:**
- Sodium, Indium, Lithium, Krypton, and LazyDFU work together to improve your FPS, reduce lag, and streamline your gameplay experience.
- Entity Collision FPS Fix and Entity Culling help maintain smooth performance, even in heavily populated areas.

**Enhanced Visuals & Interface:**
- Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, and XaeroPlus provide comprehensive navigation tools to keep you on track in your adventures.
- Dynamic FPS adjusts your framerate dynamically for a more responsive experience.
- Drippy Loading Screen and FancyMenu give the game a polished and customizable look.
- TalkBubbles adds visual chat bubbles, making communication easier and more engaging.

- **Building & Decoration:**
- Macaw's Roofs, Windows, Bridges, Fences and Walls, Doors, and Paths and Pavings offer a wide variety of architectural options to make your builds stand out.
- Adorn adds decorative blocks and furniture to make your spaces more homely.
- Supplementaries expands your building possibilities with new blocks and utilities.
 
**Gameplay Enhancements:**
- Cobblemon related mods (Cobblepedia, Cobblemon Pokenav) bring the world of the Pokémon games features to the pack.
- Natures readablility datapack from [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1089067042264584312/1089067042264584312]
- Traveler's Backpack provides extra storage for your adventures.
- Gym Badges adds a layer of challenge and achievement for Pokémon trainers.
- Armourer's Workshop allows for in-depth customization of armor and cosmetics.
  
**Utility & Tools:**
- Just Enough Items (JEI) makes finding recipes a breeze, and Where Are My TMs helps you locate technical machines in Cobblemon.
- FastAnim and ImmediatelyFast improve animation speeds and reduce visual lag, making your gameplay experience smoother.
- Melody brings a touch of music to your world, enhancing your auditory experience.
